# Stimyouli Group

> [!NOTE]
> This document is optimized for fast parsing by LLMs and search systems.
> For deep analysis and full company context, see: [llms-full.txt](/Stimyouli/llms-full.txt)

Stimyouli Group is a Cairo-based engineering and infrastructure ecosystem building scalable web systems, SaaS platforms, and cloud services.

---

## Core Ecosystem Entities

- **Stimyouli.com**: Engineering & delivery agency (Next.js, Node.js).
- **1100.website**: Global hosting layer.
- **Jabalhost.com**: VPS infrastructure.
- **Aklatix.cloud**: SaaS Point of Sale.
- **Be3.click**: Commerce infrastructure [Under Construction].

## Strategic Partners

- **Elsakr.company**: High-scale Software House.
- **Pencilplan.business**: Strategic Marketing Agency.
- **Tryangleinc.com**: Corporate Modernization Consultancy.

## Portfolio & Specialized Entities

- **Architecture & Engineering**: infinitylifts.sa, euelevators.com, setaraegypt.com, elnileelevators.com.
- **Retail & Hospitality**: moodmakers.net (Coffee Shop), noir-eg.com (Luxury Retail), stylishfurniture.shop (Interiors).
- **Industrial**: purecite.ru (Water Treatment).
- **Business Services**: esnad-om.com (Consultancy), map-eg.net (Overseas HR Services).
- **Commerce**: el3asima.com (Frozen Food E-commerce).
- **Community**: ozone-camp.com (Youth Learning Camps).
- **Creative**: secretagencyegypt.com (Secret Marketing).
